text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I invite Tazuna to go see a movie<n>since I happen
to have a discount<n>coupon for the theater.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I arrive at the theater to find Tazuna<n>overjoyed.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Did you know the movie theater just<n>underwent
a large-scale renovation?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: The sound system got major improvements! It seems they werehanding out coupons to celebrate thegrand reopening.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The gigantic screen and booming<n>sound are the
best parts of going to<n>the movies, don't you
think?
choice_data_list: You really like movies, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I sure do! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, we haven't<n>decided on which
movie to see yet!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any specific genre<n>preferences, so
anything would be<n>great!
choice_data_list: Let's see Bad Housewife: The Twenty Billion Yen Woman.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh right, that spy movie! Yeah, that<n>sounds
exciting!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There's something kind of appealing<n>about
leading a secret double life like<n>that. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
...Oh my. Sorry, but do you mind if I go<n>buy a
towel?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Well... You see...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm definitely going to cry during this<n>one! A
handkerchief won't be<n>enough!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: ...And so Tazuna and I enjoy a movie<n>together.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, that was so fun! Thanks so<n>much for
inviting me today!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I've been so busy lately that I<n>haven't been able
to go to the movies,<n>so I was really happy to step
back into<n>the world of cinema today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I do! The movies themselves are<n>great, of
course, but I—how should I<n>put this? I really love
movie theaters!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
With smartphones and the internet,<n>it's easy to
watch movies anywhere,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Riding the train, walking to the theater,<n>picking out
your seat, watching the<n>trailers, and waiting for
the main<n>feature...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I can't get enough of that feeling of<n>anticipation!
It's like waiting for the<n>starting gates to open! ♪
choice_data_list: ...How do you know what that feels like?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Uh, what I mean is...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh! This is our stop!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, this is where we must part! Be<n>careful on
the way home!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After Tazuna leaves, I look up at the<n>digital
billboard in front of the station.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She made her mark, but then left the<n>racing world
forever... Yet her legend<n>has endured through the
ages...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: The Phantom Umamusume,returning soon to a theater near you!
